inputs.fcf_source: Mid-cycle owner cash: FY2024 dividend $20/sh and FY2025 $17.50/sh despite loss; normalized below peak $47.83 EPS
inputs.normalization_note: FY2025 trough: net loss ($28.9M), NRV/flood charges; Lawrence uses mid-cycle distributable cash not spot loss year.

nav_overlay.overlay_rationale: Marvin fact-check 2026-06-02: probability-weighted water + land + minerals above $106M carrying; 30% overlap haircut on water vs operating farm; Lawrence cash unchanged.

gaap_vs_fair_value.policy_source: FY2025 annual: land and related water investments at historical cost

asset_inventory_verified.acres_source: ParcelQuest via GV Wire/SJV Water (~159k CA); Marvin mid-case 145k
asset_inventory_verified.acre_feet_transferred_source: GV Wire/SJV Water DWR and district records (2021)

water_rights_scenarios.evidence: 102k+ AF documented transfers (GV Wire) as lower bound
Between documented transfers and press mid-case
Toward Groundbreaker $5k/AF on high AF (AF unverified)

segments_or_options.label: Senior San Joaquin / Tulare basin surface water
segments_or_options.evidence: water_rights_scenarios expected $846M enterprise; 30% overlap haircut vs farm cash flows

segments_or_options.label: Irrigated land surface (incremental to GAAP line)
segments_or_options.nav_assumption: 145k CA acres x $4k-$6k marks partial probability [Assumption]; partial overlap with water

segments_or_options.label: Subsurface oil/gas/mineral interests
segments_or_options.evidence: FY2025 note 1; no fair value in filing

not_in_model_requires_refresh: Company-reported total acre-feet and seniority schedule
Transaction prices on 102k+ AF Kings County transfers
Australia acreage fair value if material to consolidated equity
nav_overlay.external_bull_nav_notes: Groundbreaker $2B-$6B water on 400k AF (5% scenario weight); Marvin expected water EV ~$846M before overlap haircut

blended_best.notes: Lawrence gate unchanged; Marvin probability-weighted economic NAV ~$1,480/sh (fact_check_water_nav_2026-06-02.md)

marvin_economic_nav.notes: Not GAAP; not Lawrence base IRR

optionality_gate.notes: Price ~0.70x GAAP book; thin OTC liquidity; family control; mineral rights option not in Lawrence FCF path.
optionality_gate.economic_nav_note: Probability-weighted asset overlay; primary stance gate remains Lawrence 1.1%

bear.notes: Sustained crop stress, lower dividends, leverage on $280M credit lines

base.notes: Mid-cycle owner cash $22/sh, cotton/tomato normalization after FY2025 NRV/flood charges

sotp_build.double_count_note: 30% overlap haircut on water vs mid-cycle farm cash; land surface partial overlap with water line

lines.label: Senior surface water (probability-weighted, net overlap)
lines.math: E[water] $846M x 70% overlap factor / 964,210 sh; see nav_overlay.water_rights_scenarios

lines.label: Irrigated land surface above GAAP land line
lines.math: ~145k CA acres; partial mark above $106M combined land+water carrying [Assumption]

lines.label: Subsurface minerals (probability-weighted)
lines.math: P=35% x illustrative full mark; filing note 1

lines.label: Mid-cycle operating franchise (cotton, processing)
lines.math: [Assumption] Normalized earnings power not captured at trough FY2025

sotp_build.notes: Economic NAV overlay; Lawrence FCF path separate

bull.notes: Strong cotton/pricing, insurance tailwinds repeat, buybacks accretive

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Land and related water investments $106M at cost; subsurface oil/gas/mineral interests (FY2025 annual report note 1)

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / acreage / dormant royalty?
option_scan.evidence: Fractional mineral interests CA/OR; not separately quantified in filings

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Single reportable segment; FY2025 operating loss is cyclical not structural split

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in FCF?
option_scan.evidence: Bill-and-hold $7.08M at June 30, 2025; crop insurance recoveries episodic

option_scan.question: Transitory legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: Insurance recoveries flow through revenue, not litigation lump sum

human_review.notes: Economic NAV ~$1,480/sh and synthesis weights approved 2026-06-03; headline 2.91% (7yr blend); Lawrence cash -1.4% is accumulate bar.
human_review.economic_nav_water_af: Approved 2026-06-03; overlay ~$1,480/sh; 400k AF press claim still unverified

paths.label: Lawrence owner cash (mid-cycle)
paths.weight_why: Only path tied to 10-K/10-Q owner cash with growth mechanism + falsifier runner; highest refutation reach.
weight_falsifiers: Any triggered growth falsifier forces weight cut or path removal
Theory-implied diverges from falsifier-adjusted by >2pp without documented mechanism change
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: weight tracks evidence tier, not target IRR

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

paths.label: NAV overlay dated payoff (10yr to overlay base)
paths.weight_why: Answers a different question (NAV convergence) than 7yr cash-flow IRR; capped weight to avoid theory conflation.
weight_falsifiers: NAV overlay base not updated when segment build or filings change >10%
floor_pass false but weight above 15% without [HUMAN REVIEW]

qualitative_adjustments.factor: No dated predictive attribute at spot
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Scarcity is descriptive; no timed mispricing catalyst in base
qualitative_adjustments.falsifier: Cross-check names dated catalyst with timeline

flags: NAV overlay is a different theory (asset payoff vs cash-flow IRR); weight capped at 10% to limit theory conflation.

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

themes.label: AI compute -> power demand -> grid/water constraint -> scarce Permian surface

indicators.label: TPL water segment revenue (USD m, FY)

peer_context.note: Context only; percentile rank not in base IRR.

top_dissents.label: Horizon Kinetics
top_dissents.falsifier: No dated contractual payoff or royalty/trust structure

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].

total_return_panel.error: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.
total_return_panel.return_contract: split-adjusted close excluding dividends; event amounts normalized for later splits; cash reinvested at ex-date close; pre-tax nominal

coverage.note: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.

valuation_methodology.decision_rule: Use one complete non-overlapping component schedule. The legacy Lawrence return path remains a separate stance gate until the primary evidence bridges are complete.

component_valuation.coverage_statement: Phase 3 scaffold identifies every currently known material operating, financial, liability, reserve, and option claim once. Primary ownership and cash/NAV bridges remain open follow-up gates.

valuation.evidence: Existing BWEL valuation inputs: Mid-cycle owner cash: FY2024 dividend $20/sh and FY2025 $17.50/sh despite loss; normalized below peak $47.83 EPS; FY2025 equity $755.1M / 964,210 shares (investor-documents/ir-bwel/2025-06-30_Annual_Report.pdf); FY2025 trough: net loss ($28.9M), NRV/flood charges; Lawrence uses mid-cycle distributable cash not spot loss year. [HUMAN REVIEW — Phase 3 scaffold requires a primary-source bridge].
valuation.assumption_summary: Phase 3 direct per-share scaffold. It is a provisional valuation range, not a committee-approved price target.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile the range to primary filings, a reproducible owner-cash or NAV bridge, and the identified liability and capital claims before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows that the economic claim, cash conversion, ownership, or required capital is materially worse than this low case.

valuation.evidence: Existing BWEL valuation inputs: Mid-cycle owner cash: FY2024 dividend $20/sh and FY2025 $17.50/sh despite loss; normalized below peak $47.83 EPS; FY2025 equity $755.1M / 964,210 shares (investor-documents/ir-bwel/2025-06-30_Annual_Report.pdf); FY2025 trough: net loss ($28.9M), NRV/flood charges; Lawrence uses mid-cycle distributable cash not spot loss year. economic_claim.description: One diluted share of BWEL, including every currently identified operating claim, financial claim, liability, reserve, and material option.
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Operating and asset claims are valued once; cash, debt, financing, reserves, and other senior claims are separate components or explicitly reserved. No component is intended to overlap another.

economic_value.accounting_reference: Existing research and filing-derived valuation inputs. The primary-source reconciliation remains an open evidence gate.

component_groups.label: Farming and operating-asset owner cash
component_groups.valuation_basis: Phase 3 direct per-share scaffold. It is a provisional valuation range, not a committee-approved price target.
component_groups.adjustments: The low/base/high range incorporates ownership, tax, capital, cycle, timing, and realization uncertainty pending the primary bridge.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key current_operating_claim; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

component_groups.label: Land, water, and mineral optionality
component_groups.valuation_basis: Phase 3 direct per-share scaffold. It is a provisional valuation range, not a committee-approved price target.
component_groups.adjustments: The low/base/high range incorporates ownership, tax, capital, cycle, timing, and realization uncertainty pending the primary bridge.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key asset_option_inventory; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

risk_and_timing.probability_basis: Starter probability is explicit analyst judgment pending a primary-source milestone and ownership reconciliation.
risk_and_timing.timing_basis: The range includes delay and failure outcomes; dated cash realization remains [HUMAN REVIEW].
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Remaining owner-funded capital, financing, and dilution are reserved until the primary sources-and-uses bridge is complete.

component_review_queue.decision_rule: Each assigned rater records accept, challenge, or reject with a proposed range and evidence. The aggregator may not silently average disputed ranges.

items.label: Farming and operating-asset owner cash
mandatory_checks: Is the valuation method appropriate for this economic claim?
Is the security's ownership claim and economic-unit denominator reconciled correctly?
Does the evidence support the low/base/high range and its timing?
Are comparable assets truly like-for-like after production, contract, location, capital, ownership, and realization adjustments?
For an option, are success probability, time to realization, and remaining owner-funded capital explicit?
Is the component additive, or already embedded in another component?
What observation would move the base estimate materially?

valuation_method_route.label: Scarce assets, royalties, and optionality
failure_modes: gross asset value mistaken for shareholder value
operating cash flow and NAV counted twice
remote options treated as contracted cash
valuation_method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

probability_and_timing.probability_basis: Starter probability is explicit analyst judgment pending a primary-source milestone and ownership reconciliation.
probability_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Remaining owner-funded capital, financing, and dilution are reserved until the primary sources-and-uses bridge is complete.

economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: The low/base/high range incorporates ownership, tax, capital, cycle, timing, and realization uncertainty pending the primary bridge.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Primary evidence shows that the economic claim, cash conversion, ownership, or required capital is materially worse than this low case.

economic_ownership_map.label: Cash, debt, and other net claims
economic_ownership_map.ownership_claim: Cash, debt, and other net claims
economic_ownership_map.growth_driver: Phase 3 direct per-share scaffold. It is a provisional valuation range, not a committee-approved price target.

required_reinvestment.treatment: explicit in driver model or included in the stated owner-cash conversion and component range

economic_ownership_map.evidence: Existing BWEL valuation inputs: Mid-cycle owner cash: FY2024 dividend $20/sh and FY2025 $17.50/sh despite loss; normalized below peak $47.83 EPS; FY2025 equity $755.1M / 964,210 shares (investor-documents/ir-bwel/2025-06-30_Annual_Report.pdf); FY2025 trough: net loss ($28.9M), NRV/flood charges; Lawrence uses mid-cycle distributable cash not spot loss year. [HUMAN REVIEW — Phase 3 scaffold requires a primary-source bridge].
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: The low/base/high range incorporates ownership, tax, capital, cycle, timing, and realization uncertainty pending the primary bridge.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Primary evidence shows that the economic claim, cash conversion, ownership, or required capital is materially worse than this low case.

method_route.label: Scarce assets, royalties, and optionality
failure_modes: gross asset value mistaken for shareholder value
operating cash flow and NAV counted twice
remote options treated as contracted cash
method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only the terminal multiple.

top_value_drivers.label: Cash, debt, and other net claims

falsifiers: Primary evidence shows that the economic claim, cash conversion, ownership, or required capital is materially worse than this low case.

required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

universal_valuation_contract.decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material economic claim is valued exactly once and every material evidence blocker is resolved.
